abilities.name: Luck Thief
abilities.text: When performing opposed duels against this model, enemy models treat all (soulstone) as if they were (-).

abilities.name: Stack the Deck
abilities.text: Before a friendly model within 6" resists an attack, they may remove a friendly Brilliance token to receive a (soulstone).

abilities.name: Unimpressed
abilities.text: When resolving, if the attacking model declared a trigger, reduce the damage dealt to this model by 2.

actions.name: Card Sharp
actions.effects: This model may look at the top card of the target's fate deck and may choose to discard it.

triggers.name: Do You Fold?
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or gain a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

triggers.name: Come Play at My Table
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with an ally within 6" of itself.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Hit the Jackpot
actions.effects: Look at the top four cards of your fate deck and discard any number of them. Place the remaining cards on top of your fate deck in any order.
